popularStory.headline: John Frost
popularStory.description:
John FROST was born about 1540 in , of Glemsford, Suffolk, England.742 He died on 6 Feb 1609 in , Hartest, Suffolk, England.742 

 Called "young John" in father's will

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Frost於1540年1月8日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯坦斯亞德時，他的父親William Frost II44歲，母親Philippa Scott43歲。他於1558年1月29日與Ann Scott在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1609年3月5日在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可哈斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Frost于1540年1月8日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可斯坦斯亞德时，他的父亲William Frost II44岁，母亲Philippa Scott43岁。他于1558年1月29日与Ann Scott在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1609年3月5日在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可哈斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Frost
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Danish, and Swedish: nickname for someone who suffers from being cold, or perhaps used in the sense ‘frosty, cold as frost, without warmth of feeling’, or perhaps ‘having the appearance of being covered with frost’ for one with white hair or a white beard. From Old English, Old High German, Old Norse frost ‘frost’.

variants.name: Chell
meanings: English (Staffordshire): from an unrecorded Middle English male or female personal name Chell(e) or Chele, Old English Cēolla, Cēol, or Cēola, short forms of names beginning with Cēol- ‘ship’, such as Cēolbeorht (male) and Cēolflǣd (female). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English chele, chile (Old English cīele, cēle, cȳle) ‘cold, lacking sympathy’. Compare Frost .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Frost was born on 8 January 1540, in Stanstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Frost II, was 44 and his mother, Philippa Scott, was 43. He married Ann Scott on 29 January 1558, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 5 March 1609, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Hartest, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Frost est né le 8 janvier 1540, à Stanstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Frost II, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Philippa Scott, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Ann Scott le 29 janvier 1558, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 5 mars 1609, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Hartest, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Frost am 8. Januar 1540 in Stanstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Frost II 44 und seine Mutter Philippa Scott 43. Er hat am 29. Januar 1558 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Ann Scott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 5. März 1609 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hartest, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Frost è nato il il 8 gennaio 1540 nel Stanstead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Frost II, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Scott, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Ann Scott il 29 gennaio 1558, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 5 marzo 1609, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Hartest, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Frostが1540年1月8日にイギリスイギリススフォルクスタンステアドで生まれた時，父William Frost IIは44歳，母Philippa Scottは43歳であった。1558年1月29日にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでAnn Scottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1609年3月5日に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクハーテストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Frost(이)가 1540년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스탠스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Frost II(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Scott(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1558년 1월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 Ann Scott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 3월 5일 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 하츠트에 묻혔다.

pt.8 January 1540–5 March 1609: 8 de janeiro de 1540–5 de março de 1609
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Frost nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1540, em Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Frost II, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Scott, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Scott em 29 de janeiro de 1558, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de março de 1609, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Hartest, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Frost родился 8 января 1540 г. в местности станстид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Frost II было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Scott, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Scott 29 января 1558 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 5 марта 1609 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности хартест, суффолк, Англия.

es.8 January 1540–5 March 1609: 8 de enero de 1540–5 de marzo de 1609
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Frost nació el 8 de enero de 1540, en Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Frost II, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Philippa Scott, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Ann Scott el 29 de enero de 1558, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 5 de marzo de 1609, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Hartest, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
